Maintenance and optimization of existing sites.

experience_details.title: ASUS France
description: Design, development, management and maintenance of French websites.
International collaboration: coordination with ASUS Europe and implementation of technical fixes via Jira, in connection with Taiwan.
Support and translation: adaptation of marketing content in French and technical assistance for European campaigns.
Participation in marketing meetings: contribution to digital strategies and integration of marketing initiatives on web platforms.

experience_details.title: MGS Informatique
description: Design, development, management and maintenance of websites.

Consultation and analysis of client company needs.
